metadata.name: context-handover
metadata.description: Context transfer protocol for multi-agent handover and session continuity

protocol.step: Subagent completes with AgentOutput (totalDurationMs, totalTokens, usage)
Parent receives content[] text blocks as structured summary
Parent continues with summarized context (not full subagent transcript)
New query() call with resume=sessionId preserves full conversation
forkSession=true creates independent branch from resume point
Each query() call has independent total_cost_usd
PreCompact hook fires with trigger and custom_instructions
Context is summarized preserving key decisions and artifacts
pre_tokens count captures context size before compaction
Post-compact context retains CLAUDE.md, tools, system prompt
Agent calls request-checkpoint with budgetUsed, summary
Checkpoint captures: task state, cost so far, artifacts produced
If budget extended: agent continues with fresh budget allocation
If budget denied: agent produces final summary and stops

context-rules.rule: Always pass organizationId through handover boundaries
Always pass sessionId for cost correlation
Never transfer full tool call logs — summarize to findings
Preserve STO frontmatter (role, fitness_function, safety_research) across handovers
Track cumulative cost across all handover boundaries via SessionCostTracker
